subject: Two Eternal warriors encased in Lazotep-lacquered armor — a massive quadrupedal beast-creature in the foreground and a humanoid warrior in the background raising a blade, both rendered in deep cobalt blue with gold trim, advancing through a gothic city plaza
description: A wide scene showing two Eternal creatures in matching deep cobalt-blue Lazotep armor advancing through what appears to be Ravnica's cityscape. In the foreground, a large quadrupedal beast — heavily armored, with a skull-like horned head and segmented body — lunges forward in a predatory crouch. Its proportions suggest something like a massive armored hound or reptilian beast but specific creature features are partially obscured by the armor plating. In the background-left, a humanoid warrior figure holds a sword raised overhead. Both are rendered in the same cobalt-blue and gold palette, indicating their shared Eternal nature. Gothic towers and archways are visible in the far background under a muted daytime sky. The flavour text confirms the Eternals operate in chilling coordinated harmony.
foreground: Massive quadrupedal beast in cobalt-blue Lazotep armor, skull-like horned head, lunging forward
background: Humanoid Eternal warrior with raised sword, gothic city architecture, pale sky
emotion: cold, purposeful — no emotion in undead forms, mechanical coordinated advance
